description:
My Fintech Newsletter for more interviews and the latest insights:
↪︎ https://rexsalisbury.substack.com/

In this episode, I sit down with Brex co-founder and CEO Pedro Franceschi at their San Francisco headquarters. Pedro explains why Brex is going all in on Agentic Commerce and how AI agents can transform B2B purchasing—from procurement to accounting. We discuss building AI products at scale, creating 9-9-6 startup teams inside large companies, and why the $1.8 trillion corporate card market is up for grabs in the age of AI.

Pedro Franceschi: linkedin.com/in/pfranceschi

00:00:00 - Brex's Big Bet on Agentic Commerce
00:02:06 - Defining Agentic Commerce in B2B
00:04:47 - The Hidden Complexity of B2B Purchases
00:07:13 - Why You Must Start New, Not Change
00:10:07 - Betting Early on Automation Pre-AI
00:12:08 - Selling New Products to Existing Customers
00:15:02 - Why Products Are 90% Done at Launch
00:17:25 - The "Operate at All Levels" Philosophy
00:20:01 - Why This Team Works 9-9-6 In-Person
00:22:15 - Building Small, High-Intensity AI Teams
00:24:05 - Measuring Success: Are You Proud?
00:26:07 - Building the Agent Platform Vision
00:28:02 - Three Phases of Brex's Evolution
00:30:49 - Fintech's Invisible Monetization Edge
00:32:31 - Why Automation Demands Come from the Top
00:34:11 - Reinforcement Learning Breakthroughs
00:40:00 - The $1.8 Trillion Corporate Card Opportunity
00:44:30 - Competing Against Legacy Banks
00:47:00 - The Future of AI in Finance

___
Rex Salisbury LinkedIn:
↪︎ https://www.linkedin.com/in/rexsalisbury

Twitter: https://twitter.com/rexsalisbury
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@rex.salisbury
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rexsalisbury/
